title: JavaScript Basics & Setup
description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals, set up development environment, and write your first script.
objectives: Learn about variables and data types
exercises: Write a script that greets the user
Create variables of different data types

title: Operators & Expressions
description: Master JavaScript operators for arithmetic, comparison, logical operations, and type coercion.

title: Control Flow
description: Control program execution with if/else statements, switch cases, and loops.
exercises: Implement a days of week program

title: Functions
description: Create reusable code with functions, parameters, return values, and different function types.

title: Arrays
description: Work with arrays, array methods, and common array operations in JavaScript.

title: Objects
description: Work with JavaScript objects, properties, methods, and object-oriented concepts.

title: ES6+ Features
description: Master modern JavaScript features including let/const, template literals, and destructuring.
exercises: Convert code to use ES6 features

title: DOM Manipulation
description: Interact with the Document Object Model to create dynamic web pages.

title: Events & Event Handling
description: Master JavaScript event handling for interactive web applications.

title: Asynchronous JavaScript
description: Master asynchronous programming with callbacks, promises, and async/await.

title: Fetch API & AJAX
description: Make HTTP requests to APIs using Fetch API and handle responses.
exercises: Fetch data from a public API

title: Error Handling
description: Handle errors gracefully in JavaScript using try/catch and custom error handling.

title: Regular Expressions
description: Use regular expressions for pattern matching and string manipulation.

title: Local Storage & Cookies
description: Store data in the browser using Local Storage, Session Storage, and Cookies.
exercises: Create a theme switcher with persistence
Implement a login remember me feature
Create a notes app with auto-save

title: Classes & OOP
description: Master Object-Oriented Programming in JavaScript using classes and inheritance.

title: Modules
description: Organize code using ES6 modules for better structure and maintainability.

title: Node.js Basics
description: Get started with Node.js for server-side JavaScript development.

title: Express.js Framework
description: Build web applications and APIs using the Express.js framework.
exercises: Build a REST API for a blog

title: Database Integration
description: Connect and interact with databases using MongoDB and Mongoose.

title: React Basics
description: Get started with React for building user interfaces with components and state.

title: React Advanced Concepts
description: Master React hooks, context API, and performance optimization techniques.

title: React Router & Navigation
description: Implement client-side routing and navigation in React applications.

title: State Management with Redux
description: Manage application state globally using Redux and Redux Toolkit.

title: Testing JavaScript Applications
description: Write tests for JavaScript applications using Jest and React Testing Library.
exercises: Write tests for a form validator

title: TypeScript Fundamentals
description: Add static typing to JavaScript with TypeScript for better code quality.

title: Web Performance Optimization
description: Optimize web applications for speed, performance, and better user experience.

title: Security Best Practices
description: Implement security measures to protect web applications from common vulnerabilities.

title: Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
description: Build installable, offline-capable web applications with PWA features.

title: WebSockets & Real-time Communication
description: Build real-time applications using WebSockets for bidirectional communication.

title: Full-Stack Project: E-commerce Platform
description: Build a complete full-stack e-commerce platform with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
